content.text:
I’ve opened the TopEmployeesByRevenue view for you, filtered to year 2024, employees based in Europe (European territories), and all 12 months (Jan–Dec 2024).

This view ranks employees by revenue for the full year. Next steps I can take (pick any):
- Open TopEmployeesTable for a detailed earnings table by employee and month
- Show RegionalAnalysis to map employee performance to Northwind regions
- Display TopEmployees (chart) plus OrdersCount (monthly order activity) side‑by‑side
- Produce a TopEmployeesReport with insights and recommendations

Which of these would you like me to display next?
